newsSince: Negative, news-driven. The -14% move since June 9 was driven by a Jefferies downgrade to Underperform with an €85 PT (~40% below the prior €140.15 close), citing an ~85% EV/EBITDA premium to optical peers and pushing back on Co-Packaged-Optics step-change hopes (Photonics-SOI growth seen at only 30-40% through FY30). Jefferies also flags stuck RF-SOI inventory (~2M wafers) and falling handset units, with FY27 profitability pressured by low fab loading, FX and lower funding.

verdicts.rankRationale: Contrary to the prior 'no-news flush' read, the -14% was a Jefferies Underperform downgrade (€85 PT) attacking valuation and CPO step-change hopes, with stuck RF-SOI inventory and weak handsets pressuring FY27 fab loading. On the AI-node materials lens that is a real negative, warranting a step down.
verdicts.bull: Photonics-SOI crossed $100M, levered to AI fab/HBM substrate demand.
verdicts.neutral: AI-substrate optionality real but small vs RF-SOI cyclical drag.
verdicts.bear: Jefferies Underperform; FY27 hit by low fab loading, FX, weak handsets.
verdicts.primaryRisk: RF-SOI inventory glut and FY27 margin compression

verdicts.rankRationale: On the CPO lens this is the most direct hit: Jefferies explicitly pushed back on the Co-Packaged-Optics step-change for Photonics-SOI (only 30-40% growth through FY30) while cutting to Underperform at €85 on an 85% peer premium. The 'hidden enabler' substrate thesis is challenged on its own terms; step down.
verdicts.bull: Engineered substrates remain a structural enabler for silicon photonics/CPO.
verdicts.neutral: Photonics-SOI growing but slower step-change than bulls assumed.
verdicts.bear: Jefferies Underperform; 85% EV/EBITDA premium; CPO upside questioned.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: Photonics-SOI design wins into CPO platforms
verdicts.primaryRisk: Valuation derate as CPO step-change is repriced lower
